---
title: "HMS2024-2025"
author: "Justin Liu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 1
    number_sections: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
urlcolor: blue
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(readr)

```

# Data Input

```{r, results='hide'}

mywd <- "/Users/justinl/Desktop/Acadamic/Intern/NYU/HMS/Data"
setwd(mywd)

HMS24 <- read.csv("HMS_2024-2025_PUBLIC_instchars.csv")

```

# Subsetting
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(knitr)
library(tidyr)

vars <- c("age", "AI_3", "flourish", "deprawsc", "anx_score")

# 1) Subset: only require age and AI_3 to be valid (others can be NA)
HMS24_sub <- HMS24 %>%
  transmute(
    age = as.numeric(age),
    AI_3 = as.numeric(AI_3),
    flourish = as.numeric(flourish),
    deprawsc = as.numeric(deprawsc),
    anx_score = as.numeric(anx_score)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age),
    !is.na(AI_3),
    AI_3 %in% 1:6
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Keep invalid ranges as NA (do not drop rows)
    flourish = ifelse(flourish >= 8 & flourish <= 56, flourish, NA_real_),
    deprawsc = ifelse(deprawsc >= 0 & deprawsc <= 27, deprawsc, NA_real_),
    anx_score = ifelse(anx_score >= 0 & anx_score <= 21, anx_score, NA_real_)
  )

# 2) Missingness summary on the subset dataset
missing_table <- tibble(
  Variable = vars,
  N_total = nrow(HMS24_sub),
  N_valid = sapply(vars, function(v) sum(!is.na(HMS24_sub[[v]]))),
  N_missing = sapply(vars, function(v) sum(is.na(HMS24_sub[[v]])))
) %>%
  mutate(Pct_missing = round(100 * N_missing / N_total, 1))

kable(missing_table,
      caption = "Missingness summary for selected variables (HMS24_sub: filtered on age and AI_3 only).")

```
## Counts
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

# 1) Count comparison (valid/missing age)
age_counts <- tibble(
  Dataset = c("HMS24 (raw)", "HMS24_sub (subset)"),
  N_total = c(nrow(HMS24), nrow(HMS24_sub)),
  N_age_valid = c(sum(!is.na(HMS24$age)), sum(!is.na(HMS24_sub$age))),
  N_age_missing = c(sum(is.na(HMS24$age)), sum(is.na(HMS24_sub$age)))
) %>%
  mutate(Pct_age_missing = round(100 * N_age_missing / N_total, 1))

kable(age_counts, caption = "Age availability in raw vs subset datasets")

age_long <- bind_rows(
  HMS24 %>% transmute(Dataset = "HMS24 (raw)", age = as.numeric(age)),
  HMS24_sub %>% transmute(Dataset = "HMS24_sub (subset)", age = as.numeric(age))
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age))

ggplot(age_long, aes(x = age, fill = Dataset)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, position = "identity", alpha = 0.4) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Age distribution: Raw vs Subset (overlay)",
    x = "Age (years)",
    y = "Count"
  )

# 4) Optional: numeric summaries
age_summary <- age_long %>%
  group_by(Dataset) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = round(mean(age), 2),
    sd = round(sd(age), 2),
    median = round(median(age), 2),
    IQR = round(IQR(age), 2),
    min = min(age),
    max = max(age),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

kable(age_summary, caption = "Summary statistics of age: Raw vs Subset")

```

## Spearma
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# 1) Correlation matrix (Spearman)
cor_mat <- HMS24_sub %>%
  select(age, AI_3, flourish, deprawsc, anx_score) %>%
  cor(use = "complete.obs", method = "spearman")

# 2) Convert to long format for heatmap
cor_long <- as.data.frame(cor_mat) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Var1") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Var1, names_to = "Var2", values_to = "rho")

# 3) Heatmap
ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Var2, y = Var1, fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", rho)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(limits = c(-1, 1), midpoint = 0) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Spearman Correlation Heatmap",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = "rho"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```
# Centers at 0, scales to 1 standard deviation
```{r}

library(cluster)    # For clustering algorithms
library(factoextra) # For beautiful cluster visualization
library(tidyverse)

cluster_HMS24_sub <- HMS24_sub %>%
  select(age, AI_3, anx_score, deprawsc, flourish) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  scale()

```

# Flourish
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(factoextra)
library(ggplot2)

# 1) Build clustering matrix for age + AI_3 + flourish (complete cases only)
cluster_vars_af <- HMS24_sub %>%
  select(age, AI_3, flourish) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  scale()

# 2) Elbow method (WSS) to choose number of clusters
p_wss <- fviz_nbclust(cluster_vars_af, kmeans, method = "wss") +
  labs(subtitle = "Elbow method (WSS) for k-means: age, AI_3, flourish")

p_wss

```
## clustering
```{r cluster_age_ai_flourish_all_outputs}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(factoextra)
library(cluster)
library(knitr)
library(tibble)

# ----------------------------
# 0) Prepare clustering data
# ----------------------------
cluster_df <- HMS24_sub %>%
  select(age, AI_3, flourish) %>%
  drop_na() %>%                          # complete cases for clustering
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

cluster_vars <- scale(cluster_df)        # standardized matrix for k-means

# ----------------------------
# 1) Silhouette table (given values)
# ----------------------------
sil_df <- tibble(
  k = c(3, 4, 5),
  avg_silhouette = c(0.2712184, 0.2984562, 0.2876494)
) %>%
  mutate(
    avg_silhouette = round(avg_silhouette, 3),
    Best = ifelse(avg_silhouette == max(avg_silhouette), "*", "")
  )

kable(sil_df, caption = "Average silhouette width by number of clusters (age, AI_3, flourish)")

# Choose k (silhouette best = 4). Change to 5 if you prefer elbow.
k_best <- 5

# ----------------------------
# 2) Run k-means
# ----------------------------
set.seed(123)
km_res <- kmeans(cluster_vars, centers = k_best, nstart = 50)

df_clustered <- cluster_df %>%
  mutate(cluster_group = factor(km_res$cluster))

# ----------------------------
# 3) Cluster profiles table (raw means + n)
# ----------------------------
cluster_summary <- df_clustered %>%
  group_by(cluster_group) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Age = round(mean(age), 2),
    Avg_AI3 = round(mean(AI_3), 2),
    Avg_Flourish = round(mean(flourish), 2),
    Count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Avg_Age)

kable(cluster_summary, caption = "Cluster profiles (means) for age, AI_3, and flourish")

# ----------------------------
# 4) Cluster scatter plot (fviz_cluster)
# ----------------------------
km_res_labeled <- km_res
km_res_labeled$cluster <- df_clustered$cluster_group

fviz_cluster(
  km_res_labeled,
  data = cluster_vars,
  geom = "point",
  ellipse.type = "convex",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  main = "Cluster Analysis: Age, AI_3, and Flourish"
)

# ----------------------------
# 5) Cluster profile heatmap (z-score colors + raw means)
# ----------------------------
cluster_profile_long <- df_clustered %>%
  group_by(cluster_group) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Age = mean(age),
    Avg_AI3 = mean(AI_3),
    Avg_Flourish = mean(flourish),
    Count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Avg_Age) %>%
  mutate(cluster_label = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_group, " (n=", Count, ")")) %>%
  mutate(cluster_label = factor(cluster_label, levels = cluster_label)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Avg_Age, Avg_AI3, Avg_Flourish),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  group_by(feature) %>%
  mutate(
    z = as.numeric(scale(value)),
    value_show = round(value, 2),
    z = round(z, 2)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    feature = recode(
      feature,
      Avg_Age = "Age",
      Avg_AI3 = "AI use level (AI_3)",
      Avg_Flourish = "Flourish"
    )
  )

ggplot(cluster_profile_long, aes(x = feature, y = cluster_label, fill = z)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = value_show), size = 3.6) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(midpoint = 0) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Z-score",
    title = "Cluster profiles (means by cluster)",
    subtitle = "Sorted by average age; tile color shows standardized deviation; numbers are raw means"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())

```

# Depression
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(factoextra)
library(ggplot2)

# 1) Build clustering matrix for age + AI_3 + deprawsc (complete cases only)
cluster_vars_ad <- HMS24_sub %>%
  select(age, AI_3, deprawsc) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  scale()

# 2) Elbow method (WSS) to choose number of clusters
p_wss_dep <- fviz_nbclust(cluster_vars_ad, kmeans, method = "wss") +
  labs(subtitle = "Elbow method (WSS) for k-means: age, AI_3, deprawsc")

p_wss_dep

```

## Clustering
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(factoextra)
library(cluster)
library(knitr)
library(tibble)

# ----------------------------
# 0) Prepare clustering data
# ----------------------------
cluster_df <- HMS24_sub %>%
  select(age, AI_3, deprawsc) %>%
  drop_na() %>%                          # complete cases for clustering
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

cluster_vars <- scale(cluster_df)        # standardized matrix for k-means

# ----------------------------
# 1) Silhouette table (replace with your deprawsc values)
# ----------------------------
sil_df <- tibble(
  k = c(3, 4, 5),
  avg_silhouette = c(NA_real_, NA_real_, NA_real_)  # <-- replace with your numbers
) %>%
  mutate(
    avg_silhouette = round(avg_silhouette, 3),
    Best = ifelse(avg_silhouette == max(avg_silhouette, na.rm = TRUE), "*", "")
  )

kable(sil_df, caption = "Average silhouette width by number of clusters (age, AI_3, deprawsc)")

# Choose k (set based on elbow/silhouette)
k_best <- 5   # change if needed

# ----------------------------
# 2) Run k-means
# ----------------------------
set.seed(123)
km_res <- kmeans(cluster_vars, centers = k_best, nstart = 50)

df_clustered <- cluster_df %>%
  mutate(cluster_group = factor(km_res$cluster))

# ----------------------------
# 3) Cluster profiles table (raw means + n)
# ----------------------------
cluster_summary <- df_clustered %>%
  group_by(cluster_group) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Age = round(mean(age), 2),
    Avg_AI3 = round(mean(AI_3), 2),
    Avg_Deprawsc = round(mean(deprawsc), 2),
    Count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Avg_Age)

kable(cluster_summary, caption = "Cluster profiles (means) for age, AI_3, and deprawsc")

# ----------------------------
# 4) Cluster scatter plot (fviz_cluster)
# ----------------------------
km_res_labeled <- km_res
km_res_labeled$cluster <- df_clustered$cluster_group

fviz_cluster(
  km_res_labeled,
  data = cluster_vars,
  geom = "point",
  ellipse.type = "convex",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  main = "Cluster Analysis: Age, AI_3, and deprawsc"
)

# ----------------------------
# 5) Cluster profile heatmap (z-score colors + raw means)
# ----------------------------
cluster_profile_long <- df_clustered %>%
  group_by(cluster_group) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Age = mean(age),
    Avg_AI3 = mean(AI_3),
    Avg_Deprawsc = mean(deprawsc),
    Count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Avg_Age) %>%
  mutate(cluster_label = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_group, " (n=", Count, ")")) %>%
  mutate(cluster_label = factor(cluster_label, levels = cluster_label)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Avg_Age, Avg_AI3, Avg_Deprawsc),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  group_by(feature) %>%
  mutate(
    z = as.numeric(scale(value)),
    value_show = round(value, 2),
    z = round(z, 2)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    feature = recode(
      feature,
      Avg_Age = "Age",
      Avg_AI3 = "AI use level (AI_3)",
      Avg_Deprawsc = "PHQ-9 total (deprawsc)"
    )
  )

ggplot(cluster_profile_long, aes(x = feature, y = cluster_label, fill = z)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = value_show), size = 3.6) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(midpoint = 0) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Z-score",
    title = "Cluster profiles (means by cluster)",
    subtitle = "Sorted by average age; tile color shows standardized deviation; numbers are raw means"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())

```
